name: ne-claude-plugins
description: NE Claude Plugin Marketplace — curated plugins for development workflows, integrations, and productivity

plugins.name: jira-workflow
plugins.description: Jira integration for managing tickets, sprints, and workflows directly from Claude Code

plugins.name: code-audit
plugins.description: Multi-agent code audit with security scanning, logic analysis, and confidence-scored findings

plugins.name: deploy-guard
plugins.description: Pre-deployment validation hooks that check for secrets, broken tests, and unsafe patterns before pushing

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: MCP server for reading and writing Obsidian vault notes, enabling knowledge-base-driven development

plugins.name: discord-notify
plugins.description: Discord webhook integration for posting build results, PR updates, and deployment notifications

plugins.name: superdev
plugins.description: Opinionated dev workflow that enforces good engineering — spec refinement before code, TDD by default, KISS over complexity, multi-agent review, and full task tracking from ticket to PR

plugins.name: drawio
plugins.description: Create and edit draw.io diagrams directly from Claude Code — flowcharts, architecture diagrams, sequence diagrams, and more
